UNIT1.description: UNiform T1-weighted image produced by the MP2RAGE sequence (BIDS suffix UNIT1).

MP2RAGE.description: Magnetisation-Prepared 2 Rapid Acquisition Gradient Echoes T1-weighted image.

PSIR.description: Custom imaging modality with BIDS suffix 'PSIR'.

CT.description: Custom imaging modality with BIDS suffix 'CT'.

RAMIRA.description: Relaxation Along a Moving Inhomogeneity (RAMIRA) quantitative MRI image.

WMn.description: Custom imaging modality with BIDS suffix 'WMn'.
